description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing female figure draped in classical attire, reminiscent of Greco-Roman statuary. The figure's head is slightly bowed, with detailed hair styled in waves and a serene facial expression. The garment is intricately rendered, with folds cascading down the body and a sash tied at the waist, adding to the sense of realism. The arms are positioned close to the torso, with one arm bent and the other hanging naturally. The back of the sculpture shows the continuation of the draped fabric, with subtle texturing to suggest the weight and flow of the material. The base is simple and polygonal, providing stable support for the figure.
description: A classical-style sculpture of a standing woman in draped garments, with detailed hair and realistic folds in the clothing. The figure exudes calm and grace, standing on a simple base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the serene face, detailed hair, and the full draped garment with a sash at the waist.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm positions, and the layered folds of the dress.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the gathered fabric at the waist, and the vertical pleats of the skirt.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile, the draping of the garment, and the natural stance of the figure.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
